suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit evidence of agent-browser usage for UI-impacting changes, or explicitly document accepted alternatives when browser automation cannot be used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for misc-fixes-2 observed UI file changes with no agent-browser invocation in transcript despite the current integration-worker procedure requiring browser validation for UI work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the traceability API section to include project-scoped routes (`/api/projects/:project_path/traceability`) alongside the existing global route to prevent stale guidance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for misc-fixes-2 found architecture documentation still describing only `/api/traceability`, while router code defines both global and project-scoped traceability endpoints.
